title: Kakatiya University Results 2026 Key Highlights

detail.title: Kakatiya University Results 2026 Key Highlights
detail.short_info: Kakatiya University Result 2026 out for 1st, 3rd and 5th Semester B.H.M. & C.T. (CBCS) revaluation and 5th Semester B.Pharmacy (CBCS) on the official website - kuexams.org on 25-04-2026. Check the direct link provided here and the steps to download the Kakatiya University result.

content.text: Kakatiya University has officially declared the Kakatiya University Result 2026 for UG professional courses under the Choice Based Credit System (CBCS) for the 2025-26 academic session. The university has released the revaluation results of B.H.M. & C.T. (CBCS) I, III and V Semesters examinations held in November 2025 along with the B.Pharmacy (CBCS) V Semester examinations conducted in February 2026. Kakatiya University Result 2026 has been announced online on the official website - kuexams.org.

Students can check and download their BHM & CT and B.Pharmacy semester results by visiting the KU UG results portal, selecting the appropriate result link and entering their hall ticket number to view the marks statement. After downloading the result, candidates are advised to carefully verify their personal details, subject wise marks and result status and contact the university or their respective college in case of any discrepancy.

Kakatiya University has published new UG CBCS results for hotel management and pharmacy students under the 2026 result cycle. The latest update includes revaluation results for B.H.M. & C.T. I, III and V Semester November 2025 exams along with regular B.Pharmacy V Semester February 2026 results on the KU exams portal. Students can use their hall ticket number on the KU UG results page at kuexams.org to access and download their provisional result for reference.

content.text: Kakatiya University has activated direct online links for the B.H.M. & C.T. (CBCS) I, III & V Sem revaluation results (Nov 2025) and B.Pharmacy (CBCS) V Sem results (Feb 2026) on its UG results portal. Through these Kakatiya University Result 2026 direct links, students can immediately open the result page, enter their hall ticket number and view or download their updated marks. Candidates can use the links below to access the official KU UG result pages and check their BHM & CT and B.Pharmacy results without any delay.

B.Pharmacy (CBCS) V Semester Examinations held in February 2026

sections.heading: Steps to Check Kakatiya University Result 2026

content.text: Follow the steps below to check Kakatiya University Result 2026 for B.H.M. & C.T. and B.Pharmacy courses online.

items: Go to the official Kakatiya University UG results portal at kuexams.org/ugresults.
On the UG results page, look for the link related to your course, such as B.H.M. & C.T. I/III/V Sem Revaluation or B.Pharmacy V Sem.
Click on the appropriate result link to open the result page.
Enter your hall ticket number in the given field exactly as printed on your admit card.
Submit the details to view your Kakatiya University Result 2026 on the screen.
Check your name, hall ticket number, subject wise marks, total marks and result status carefully.
Download or print the online marks statement for your records until the original marks memo is issued by the university or your college.
If you find any error in your result, contact your college or the Kakatiya University examination branch for clarification or correction.
